name: 390 Golf Experience
address: 1051 N Prospect Ave Site B, Wood Dale, IL 60191
about: 390 Golf Experience provides a year-round, climate-controlled golf simulation venue with multiple levels of hitting bays. The facility utilizes Toptracer technology to offer various game modes, data analysis, and virtual play on famous courses. It caters to all ages and skill levels, offering both individual and group play experiences with social elements.
why_golfers_like_it: Complimentary club rentals for all guests
Multiple game modes including virtual golf and skill challenges
Social atmosphere with sports TVs and a bar partnership
Toptracer technology for detailed shot analysis

food_and_drink.notes: Bayside food service available; full restaurant service through partner Parlay Sports Bar
Available through partner Parlay Sports Bar

faq.question: Do I need golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary club rentals are available for all guests. Men's clubs are provided in each bay, and women's, left-handed, and youth clubs can be requested at check-in.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned as permitted. The venue offers bayside food service and partners with Parlay Sports Bar for full dining and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for completing 18 holes, but Toptracer game modes and skill challenges are available for various play styles.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as suitable for all ages and offers game modes like Angry Birds and Go Fish that are family-friendly. Complimentary youth club rentals are also available.
